hero.headline: Implementation analyst who bridges data, process, and platform
hero.description: 20 enterprise SaaS implementations with deep expertise in data migration, stakeholder collaboration, and process optimization. 5 years translating complex business requirements into seamless platform configurations — specializing in payroll systems and cross-functional project delivery.

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Led 20 end-to-end SaaS implementations with full data migration ownership — from legacy system extraction through platform configuration and go-live validation.
Collaborated extensively with cross-functional teams (product, engineering, support) and external stakeholders to ensure seamless onboarding experiences and timely project delivery.
Engineered complex data transformations and platform configurations, becoming SME for multiple product modules within first quarter of each new implementation.
Proactively identified process improvement opportunities, developing automation frameworks and enhanced features that reduced implementation timelines by 30%.

highlights.label: Process Innovation
highlights.text: Developed use-case-driven implementation methodology with automated complexity scoring — enabling accurate project scoping, timeline prediction, and eliminating data migration ambiguities.

highlights.label: Data Migration Expertise
highlights.text: Managed complex multi-system data migrations across 20 enterprise clients, handling diverse data formats and ensuring 100% data integrity through systematic validation processes.

highlights.label: Stakeholder Management
highlights.text: Served as primary POC for implementation workstreams across UK, US, and Middle East — facilitating executive workshops, technical teams coordination, and post-go-live support.

highlights.label: Documentation & Knowledge Transfer
highlights.text: Maintained comprehensive process documentation and conducted knowledge transfer sessions, enabling team scaling and consistent delivery quality across global implementations.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Managed data integrity and process optimization for Amazon Fresh, Pantry, and Prime Now — directly impacting operational efficiency through systematic data management.
Designed automated defect prioritization framework using data analytics and forecasting models — delivering $230K monthly operational savings.
Led cross-team collaboration to identify process gaps and implement solutions, reducing invalid case assignments by 50 daily occurrences through improved documentation and workflows.

summary: Implementation analyst with 5+ years delivering 20+ enterprise SaaS implementations with specialized expertise in data migration, platform configuration, and cross-functional project management. Proven track record of collaborating with diverse stakeholders to ensure seamless onboarding experiences while driving process improvements and automation. Expert at quickly mastering new platforms and becoming SME within 3 months.
